about.label: ABOUT
about.heading: Built hard. Finished sharp.
about.body: CPWD is a web development agency for brands that want to be taken seriously online. You bring the brief, we deliver design, code and launch.

hook.label: FIRST IMPRESSION
hook.heading: Your visitor decides faster than you think.
hook.body: Within seconds they know whether your site earns trust, or whether they move on. We deliver sites where that first impression counts.

hero.label: ABOUT CPWD
hero.heading: The agency behind the build
hero.intro: CPWD is web development from the Netherlands. Bespoke websites and web apps, from first sketch to launch. Scroll for the full dossier.

operator.label: FOUNDER
operator.heading: Christoph Pfrommer
operator.bio: Founder of CPWD. Builds sharp websites and web apps for brands that want to dominate online. Four times AWS certified. Based in the Netherlands, working with clients at home and abroad.

mission.label: APPROACH
mission.heading: You set the brief. We deliver.
mission.body: No templates, no half-finished work. We design and build *sites that look premium*, load fast and do what they should: convince visitors and drive conversion.
directives: Every page has a clear purpose
Animation supports the message, not noise
Design and development under one roof

loadout.label: EXPERTISE
loadout.heading: What we work with
loadout.intro: Modern web development, from visual concept to live website. Everything under one roof at CPWD.

items.name: Design
items.desc: Visual concepts, interfaces and design systems. Dark, sharp and considered.

items.name: Development
items.desc: Bespoke websites and web apps, fast, scalable and easy to manage.

items.name: Cloud & hosting
items.desc: Reliable hosting, security and fast load times worldwide.

items.name: Motion & interaction
items.desc: Scroll animations and micro-interactions that bring your site to life, with purpose.

record.label: TRACK RECORD
record.heading: Numbers that matter
record.intro: Experience, certifications and published work. Measurable and transparent.

cta.label: NEXT STEP
cta.heading: Ready to lock in?
cta.subtext: Tell us about your project. We'll reply with a concrete proposal and timeline.
